blended.narrative: Meadowlark is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 17 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,242 ft. Looking ahead, 26 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 49 mph may cause lift holds.

Tomorrow: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F, winds around 25 mph. Expect powder.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 30.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 29".
